label: Upzoning Incentives
description: Allows higher-density residential development. Increases housing supply but may spike land value and push up rents in the short term.
stakeholder_reaction_on: Business Alliance: 'More density means more customers, more workers, and a stronger tax base.' Tenants' Coalition: 'Upzoning without protections risks pricing out the residents who already live here.'
stakeholder_reaction_off: Tenants' Coalition: 'Pausing upzoning incentives slows displacement pressure. We appreciate the balance.'
